nasb.text: Then Rabshakeh returned and found the king of Assyria fighting against Libnah, for he had heard that the king had left Lachish.

esv.text: The Rabshakeh returned, and found the king of Assyria fighting against Libnah, for he had heard that the king had left Lachish.

cnv.text: 拉伯沙基回去的時候，正遇見亞述王攻打立拿；原來他早已聽聞亞述王拔營離開了拉吉。

ccb.text: 亚述的将军听说亚述王已经离开拉吉，便回去见王，发现王在攻打立拿。

csbs.text: 将军听到亚述王已拔营离开拉吉，就撤退了，与正在攻打立拿的亚述王会合。
